name: TerraVest Industries
confidenceReason: Serial acquirer buying at 5-6x EBITDA and optimizing cash flow. Current valuation (33.8x trailing PE) leaves limited margin of safety.
bullCase: 'The Constellation Software of Tanks and Trailers.' TerraVest is a premier mid-cap serial acquirer buying unglamorous, fragmented manufacturing assets (storage/transport for energy transition) at rock-bottom multiples and squeezing out high cash flow. High insider ownership and disciplined execution create massive compounding torque.
bearCase: Integration risk as the pace of M&A accelerates. Also exposed to the cyclicality of the energy sector, even if its 'picks and shovels' approach mitigates direct commodity price risk.

screener.note: Engine corrected fPERG → fEVG (EV/EBITDA). GAAP EPS is massively penalised by M&A amortisation — fEVG isolates true cash generation. fEVG score: 15.2 / 15 = 1.01 → marginal WAIT. Signal upgraded to DEPLOY: 31% Base CAGR ≥ 20% override threshold. QCS 4.2 and +40.1% earnings surprise confirm elite execution.

description: TerraVest Industries Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells goods and services in Canada, the United States, and internationally.
